meaning: n.命令,诫命,需要,规则,祈使语气adj.命令的,强制的,紧急的,必要的,势在必行的,[语法]祈使的
examples: In 'Go away!' the verb is in the imperative.
It is absolutely imperative that we finish by next week.
Beethoven's music tends to move from chaos to order as if order were an imperative of human existence.
It's morally imperative for developing nations to adopt policy that addresses these global change, he said.
So at a time when jobs are in short supply, building exports is an imperative.
